name: Park County Rural Schools Coalition
description: Public meetings and talks organized by Charles McKay (charles.mckay@Greenridertech.co) in Cody, Wyoming, including the Wind River Meteorological Society and the Park County rural-schools coalition opposing elementary consolidation.
